stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
If autothrust is armed what happens if the SPEED mode is selected on the Mode Contol Panel?

options.a: The V/S selected on the MCP will be maintained
options.b: The thrust levers will move to maintain the speed or Mach No selected on the MCP
options.c: The thrust levers will remain static and the programmed FMC speed will be maintained
options.d: The thrust levers will move to maintain the programmed FMC speed
